name: Evolve Golf
about: Evolve Golf is a private golf simulator venue located in Fargo, North Dakota. It operates under a per-bay-hour pricing model and is noted as the largest private golf simulator in the Fargo/Moorhead area. The facility features advanced simulation technology and is designed for a range of activities, from casual play to serious practice and corporate events. Guests can choose from 500 of the world's top golf courses, and the venue is suitable for individuals, groups, and special events.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 500 of the world's top golf courses regardless of weather
Large private facility offering a premium simulation experience
Flexible booking system and ability to bring your own food or have it delivered
Option for private events and corporate meetings

food_and_drink.notes: Guests can order food in or bring their own food to the venue.
Guests are permitted to bring their own alcoholic beverages.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue mentions guests should grab their clubs, indicating it is expected that players bring their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, guests can bring their own food and drinks. The venue also allows for food to be ordered in or delivered.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: One person can usually play 18 holes in one hour. A foursome playing 18 holes would take approximately 4 hours.

faq.question: Is Evolve Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is welcoming to families and kids, as indicated by its focus on family-friendly events and amenities.
